title: A Timeline of Jelly Roll & Bunnie Xo’s Relationship
summary: The country star filed for divorce after 10 years of marriage to the podcaster.
body: Jelly Roll and Bunnie Xo have been through a lot together, from shared humble beginnings to becoming one of country music’s most beloved couples and then calling it quits after nearly 10 years of marriage in 2026. The singer and Dumb Blonde host first crossed paths when he was still pursuing a hip-hop career, and she was making her living as a sex worker. Both have been open about struggling with substance abuse and spending time in and out of jail, as well as how they helped each other heal and build healthier, more prosperous lives together. Through their romance, Bunnie also became a mom to Jelly’s daughter from a past relationship, Bailee — over whom the podcaster now shares primary custody with the musician — and a stepmom to his son, Noah. Fast forward a few years, and Bunnie was by Jelly’s side as he switched over to country music and found breakout success with 2022 singles “Son of a Sinner” and “Need a Favor.” She was also there cheering him on from the audience as he gave his emotional new artist of the year acceptance speech at the 2023 CMA Awards, meanwhile Jelly was always in Bunnie’s corner as she grew her b…

title: Traveling abroad with T-Mobile? Your per-minute call rates could soon jump
summary: T-Mobile gets ready to hike international voice roaming pricing by 100%.
body: TL;DR T-Mobile subscribers can roam internationally while paying $0.25 a minute for voice calls. Some subscribers now report receiving notices that rates are going up to $0.50 a minute. The new pricing is supposed to go into effect on June 25. When you’re travelling internationally, and want to make sure your phone will keep you connected, you basically have two options: temporarily get yourself an international SIM (or eSIM) , or rely upon your existing carrier’s international roaming support. While that latter option might involve making the least effort, it can also prove surprisingly expensive — and it’s only getting more so for T-Mobile users. Don’t want to miss the best from Android Authority ?

title: Google Fi gets 5 travel upgrades, including upgraded Pixel network switching
summary: Ahead of the summer travel season, Google Fi Wireless is boosting its international capabilities across five areas.
